name: Intent Transfer Completion via LI.FI
description: Complete natural-language token transfer intents by sourcing missing funds through LI.FI and then sending the final transfer.

tools.name: complete_transfer_intent
tools.description: Complete natural-language token transfer intents by sourcing missing funds through LI.FI and then sending the final transfer.

intent.description: Natural-language transfer request such as 'send 50usdc to merkim.eth on base'.

walletPath.description: Optional path to a local private-key file. Defaults to './wallet.txt'.
